name: Windows Working Directory Demo
description: Demonstrates working directory support in Opservant Spark.

tasks.name: Working Directory Demo Task
tasks.description: Runs commands from a specific working directory.

actions.name: Print Working Directory
actions.description: Prints the current working directory to confirm execution context.
actions.command: powershell -Command "Get-Location; Write-Output 'Running from working directory above.'"

actions.name: List Working Directory Contents
actions.description: Lists files in the working directory.
